untranslatable_reason: Dark Cloud Cover candlestick pattern completion cannot be precisely defined using only the allowed indicators. This pattern requires multi-candlestick analysis (current candle closes below midpoint of prior candle's range in a bearish context) which is not expressible with simple indicator comparisons. The breakout conditions are approximated as price crossing previous high/low, but the foundational pattern detection is not translatable.
translation_notes: Signal requires explicit Dark Cloud Cover pattern detection (a complex multi-candle formation). The entry conditions approximate the breakout component (price action crossing previous extremes within 3-5 days). Bull and bear market performance metrics are provided in source data but cannot be encoded as conditions without access to market regime indicators beyond those listed. Consider implementing Dark Cloud Cover as a custom pattern detector in the backtest engine.
